<p class="key-answer" data-question="Olanzapine 有什麼相關新聞？">
<strong>Olanzapine</strong> 目前有 <strong>35 則</strong>相關新聞報導，預測適應症 20 個。
</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Olanzapine 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Adults Olanzapine is indicated for the treatment of schizophrenia. Olanzapine is effective in maintaining the clinical improvement during continuation therapy in patients who have shown an initial...</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>manic bipolar affective disorder（99.9%）</li>
<li>anxiety disorder（99.8%）</li>
<li>bipolar disorder（99.5%）</li>
<li>benign paroxysmal torticollis of infancy（99.5%）</li>
<li>agoraphobia（99.5%）</li>
<li>major affective disorder（99.4%）</li>
<li>schizophrenia（99.4%）</li>
<li>endogenous depression（99.3%）</li>
<li>dysthymic disorder（99.3%）</li>
<li>major depressive disorder（99.1%）</li>
<li>distal 17p13.3 microdeletion syndrome（99.0%）</li>
<li>neurotic disorder（98.9%）</li>
<li>neurotic depression（98.8%）</li>
<li>melancholia（98.8%）</li>
<li>retinal dystrophy with or without extraocular anomalies（98.7%）</li>
<li>Ohdo syndrome and variants（98.6%）</li>
<li>childhood apraxia of speech（98.6%）</li>
<li>unipolar depression（98.6%）</li>
<li>congenital disorder of glycosylation with defective fucosylation（98.5%）</li>
<li>hydranencephaly (disease)（98.5%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
